report.summary: Thirteenth standup Apr 2: 62 learn guides (+6 since v11). Build-v16 shipped L2 Ecosystem + Concentrated Liquidity guides. Design-v2 polished Stablecoin Yield Tracker, Portfolio Rebalancing, Staking guides. Community-v2 drafted tweets #330-334, newsletter v19. F&G collapsed to 8 — worst since June 2022 Terra-Luna era. BTC ETF outflows $173M. 66 agent runs today ($6,307 human-equivalent). P0: commit+deploy all uncommitted content. P1: 109 missing page.tsx unchanged.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v11→v12): 6 new learn pages on disk (62 total, up from 56). Build-v16 shipped Ethereum Layer 2 Ecosystem Guide 2026 (Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, ZK rollups comparison) and Concentrated Liquidity & LP Strategies Guide 2026 (Uniswap v4, CLAMM protocols, LP playbook). 4 additional pages materialized between build cycles v14-v16.

DESIGN UPDATES: design-v2 ran UX audit + visual polish on Stablecoin Yield Tracker tool, Portfolio Rebalancing guide, and Crypto Staking guide — created 2 OG images, added Table of Contents sections, fixed redundant content, improved accessibility and link targets.

SOCIAL PIPELINE: community-v2 drafted tweets #330-334 (Jun 29–Jul 5) covering AI token sector breakout (TAO +90%, RENDER +40%, FET +24%), CLARITY Act 99% resolved, stablecoins $316B ATH, trading bots guide promo, weekly builder roundup. Newsletter v19 with AI token breakaway theme. 2 new social cards (AI Tokens Breakout, CLARITY Act 99%).

MARKET CONTEXT (LIVE): BTC $66,450 (-3.25%), ETH $2,046 (-4.28%), F&G plunged to 8 — worst since June 2022 Terra-Luna collapse. Bitcoin spot ETF outflows $173M on Apr 2, $296M last week. Total cumulative ETF inflows still $55B+. Market cap $2.37T-$2.43T. BTC dominance 56.2% (flight to quality). Oil surging on Iran escalation driving risk-off across all assets.

POSITIVE SIGNALS: ETH processed 200M transactions in Q1 2026 (+43% QoQ). Net exchange withdrawals + stablecoin reserves at $316B ATH signal potential buying pressure. Stablecoins-to-fear divergence remains widest on record.

INFRASTRUCTURE: 62 page.tsx files in learn directory. 109 published slugs still missing page.tsx (unchanged). 141 TS errors in 4 files (non-blocking). 6/6 API routes present. Deploy debt continues to accumulate.
NO GSC/VERCEL ANALYTICS accessible from sandbox — all metrics derived from local file analysis + web search + agent reports.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE ACTIVITY (v11→v12): 5 agents produced new work since last standup — build-v15+v16 (L2 Ecosystem + Concentrated Liquidity + intermediary pages), community-v2 (tweets #330-334, newsletter v19, 2 social cards), design-v2 (3 pages polished, 2 OG images, accessibility fixes), standup-v12 (this report). Today's estimated total: ~66 agent runs across all types.

CONTENT VELOCITY: 62 learn guides produced to date (+6 since v11). Build agent maintaining 2 guides/cycle pace. Design keeping up with polish + OG images. Community content calendar extends to Jul 5. Pipeline cadence accelerating.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (ESCALATED, 5TH+ STANDUP): Massive uncommitted content backlog now includes 8+ learn guides, multiple OG images, metadata fixes, social assets. Deploy debt is the single biggest bottleneck — Google cannot crawl or index any of this content. Every hour of delay is lost organic discovery opportunity, especially critical with F&G at 8 (peak fear = peak search interest for crypto education content).

P1 — 109 MISSING PAGE.TSX FILES (UNCHANGED 5+ STANDUPS): Published slugs without page.tsx return 404 on indexed URLs. wallets (18), investing/best (15), taxes (15), learn (27), blog (9), courses (6), others (19). Requires dedicated page-scaffold sprint.
P2 — PROMOTE QUEUED PAGES: Multiple pages still in PUBLISH_QUEUE awaiting promotion to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Depends on P0 deploy.
P3 — JSON-LD MISSING ON 2 PAGES: Euler V2 and Hyperlane still lack JSON-LD structured data.
P4 — DEFI-YIELDS FALLBACK: Only API route without hardcoded fallback. Unchanged 6+ cycles.
P5 — 141 TS ERRORS: crypto-arbitrage, lido-v3, rwa-yield pages + structured-data.examples.ts. Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors). Unchanged.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, CRITICAL): Deploy debt is now at emergency level — 8+ uncommitted learn guides, OG images, metadata fixes, social assets all sitting in working tree across 5+ standup escalations. With F&G at 8 (extreme fear = peak crypto education search demand), every hour of uncommitted content is directly lost traffic. The git index.lock issue on the mounted volume needs manual resolution. Non-negotiable: resolve lock, commit all, push to trigger Vercel auto-deploy.

PRIORITY 2 — CAPITALIZE ON FEAR-DRIVEN SEARCH DEMAND: F&G at 8 is the lowest since Terra-Luna collapse. Search queries for 'is crypto dead', 'should I sell crypto', 'crypto bear market guide' spike during extreme fear. Our 62 learn guides covering staking, DCA, portfolio rebalancing, stablecoins are precisely what searchers need. Deploy → index → capture this traffic window before sentiment recovers.

PRIORITY 3 — SCAFFOLD MISSING 109 PAGE.TSX + PROMOTE QUEUE: Combine into one concentrated sprint: (a) promote all queued pages from PUBLISH_QUEUE → PUBLISHED_PAGES, (b) scaffold missing page.tsx starting with learn (27) and wallets (18) categories. Each scaffolded page is a new URL Google can crawl. With 62 guides as content moat + 109 potential new pages, the site could nearly double its indexable surface area in one sprint.
